spec_match.rationale: The gallery still uses real video elements and CSS :playing, :paused, and :muted selectors for state-driven card styling.

interactive.rationale: Each generated video card now references local CC0 WebM/MP4 sources instead of a minimal inline MP4, but chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable for playback verification.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page remains aligned with the feature blurb about CSS-owned visual playback state.

edge_cases.rationale: The gallery now has two codec sources per video, but progress and mute-state behavior still need live browser testing.

references.rationale: The page includes the required ChromeStatus reference and links to related media pseudo-class demos.

design_system.rationale: The generated card structure and existing visual design are preserved.

openQuestions.title: Verify gallery video fixtures
openQuestions.detail: Use chrome-devtools-mcp to play/pause/mute multiple gallery cards, confirm progress updates, CSS pseudo-class styling, and absence of console/media decode errors.

summary: Static repair moved gallery videos to shared local CC0 WebM/MP4 fixtures instead of an inline minimal video payload.
